title: Oasis Ideal Floral Foam Maxlife (box contains 4 Bricks)
features: Water absorbing foam bricks used for creating flower arrangements and floral structures
Each brick holds an amazing 2 litres of water
Flowers can live up to 50% longer compared to previous foam in new OASIS Floral Foam Maxlife Foam
OASIS Brand - The world’s best selling floral foam. Manufactured in the UK
description: Product Description OASIS® Ideal Floral Foam wet bricks feature quick saturation, low drainage, an impressive ability to store 2 litres of water and guidelines for cutting, for when you do not need a full brick. A labour saving product that saves time and trouble, and most important of all gives you the security of knowing that your flowers are secure and firmly placed in the design. OASIS® Ideal Floral Foam Maxlife Bricks enable florists, flower arrangers and hobbyists to create wonderful flower arrangements and displays that are otherwise impossible or difficult to create using other mediums.OASIS® Ideal Floral Foam Maxlife Bricks provide longer life for flowers - UP TO 50% LONGER - than in previous floral foam, and for the first time, it is the only floral foam in the industry proven to meet or beat flower life in a vase.The original Floral Foam. For over 50 years OASIS® Floral Foams has set the standard by which all other foams are measured. Today it remains the brand of choice for designers, flower arrangers and hobbyists around the world. OASIS® Brand Floral Foams are made to stay wet, hold your flowers in place, and keep them fresh. There may be other green bricks that hold water, but there's no substitute for OASIS® Brand Floral Foams. Does OASIS® Brand Floral Foam deliver quality? Is OASIS® Brand Floral Foam worth insisting upon, absolutely. Since their earliest days in 1954, when V.L. Smithers revolutionised the floral industry with the creation of water-absorbing foam for florists, Smithers-Oasis has grown into a leading global manufacturer and marketer of floral foam, floral accessory products, cellular growing media, and postharvest products. Today, OASIS® is the most recognized and trusted brand in the floral industry. Box Contains 4 x OASIS® Ideal Floral Foam Maxlife Wetable Bricks
